titleStmt.title: SII 34.160: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 160. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the Dakshiṇāmūrti shrine in the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Gift of some land as kuḍi-nīṅgā-dēvadāna for offerings to the image of Dakshiṇāmūrtidēva in the temple by Chiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Vikkaviṉāyakaṉ a merchant of Śivapādaśēkhara-puram in Kuṟunagar-nāḍu a unit of Rājagembhīra-vaḷanāḍu. The donor purchased the land from the nagarattār of his village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irā
carāca tēvaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2
Irāca kempīra vaḷanāṭṭu kkuṟu
nakarnāṭṭuc civapāta cēkarapurattu
viyāpāri ciṟṟamparuṭaiyāṉ tiru
cciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ vikna viṉā
yakaṉēṉ Iṉṉāyaṉār dakṣaṇāmūrt
ti devaṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟukku viṭṭa
nilamāvatu Innakarattār pakkal nā
ṉ vilaikoṇṭa Eṉpiramāṇappaṭi
cuntaṉ kuḷattuvayalil mēṟkaṭaiya
nūṟṟaṟupatu kuḻi koṇṭatu Orumāvā
ka viṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭumāvum kuṭi nīṅkā
t tēvatāṉamāy Itukku Iṟukkuṅ
kaṭamai māttāl pāṭṭattāl nāṟkala
nellu Aḷakka kāṭavatākavum Amutu
ceytatu pacitta ci mākēcuravaṟkku
vaḻaṅkak kaṭavatāka kal veṭṭik kuṭu
ttēṉ vikkaviṉāyaṉēṉḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
